subject: A human pirate leaning forward into the light, grinning as they reach toward unseen treasure
description: A human pirate is shown in close mid-shot, lit from below by a warm reddish-orange glow that suggests firelight or the gleam of treasure reflecting up at them. They wear a wide-brimmed pirate hat and rough, layered coat or vest in dark earthy tones. Their face is split by a wide, toothy grin of greed and delight as they lean forward and reach with one hand toward something just out of frame. The background dissolves into deep red-black shadow, throwing the figure into theatrical relief. The whole image reads as the moment of plunder — a rogue catching sight of the haul.
foreground: grinning pirate in hat and rough coat, leaning forward, reaching
background: deep red-black shadow with implied torchlight or treasure glow
emotion: gleeful greed; wide grin and forward-leaning eagerness
